Looking at the image, the bar is now at the bottom-left of the main room. The white cross is visible above the bar. The progress bar shows yellow=48 and red=12.
Let me check the current bar position.
The bar appears to be at rows 35-39, cols 14-18. The white cross is at rows 31-32, cols 21-22.
Wait, the progress bar shows yellow=48, which means I have 48 actions left. This is more than before (16 actions). This is strange - the progress bar seems to have reset or increased.
Let me check the current bar position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current bar position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue bar: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White cross: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check progress bar
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Yellow: pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"Red: pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check all nodes
print(f"Total nodes: {len(seg)}")
for n in seg:
    if n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
